title: DAAD Scholarship
answer: The DAAD Scholarship is a fully funded scholarship for international students in Germany. It usually covers tuition (if applicable), monthly stipend, health insurance, and travel allowance.

title: Chevening Scholarship
answer: Chevening is the UK Government's fully funded scholarship for one-year master's degrees. It covers tuition fees, living expenses, flights, and additional grants.

title: Erasmus Mundus Scholarship
answer: Erasmus Mundus provides fully funded scholarships to study joint master's programs across multiple European countries.

title: Fulbright Scholarship
answer: Fulbright is one of the most prestigious scholarships in the United States. It funds graduate study, research, and cultural exchange programs.

title: MEXT Scholarship
answer: The Japanese Government (MEXT) Scholarship is fully funded and covers tuition, monthly allowance, and airfare for international students.

title: Türkiye Scholarships
answer: Türkiye Scholarships are fully funded by the Turkish Government and include tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, health insurance, and flight tickets.

title: Global Korea Scholarship (GKS)
answer: GKS is a fully funded South Korean government scholarship covering tuition, living expenses, airfare, and language training.

title: Stipendium Hungaricum
answer: Hungary's Stipendium Hungaricum Scholarship covers tuition fees, accommodation support, health insurance, and a monthly stipend.

title: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC)
answer: CSC Scholarships support international students in China with tuition, accommodation, health insurance, and monthly allowance.

title: Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarships
answer: Vanier Scholarships support outstanding doctoral students studying in Canada.
